title: NYAN CAT'S ADVENTURES IN NYANLAND
technique: CP437 cell art combines a large outlined cat, pink pastry body, rainbow trail, and star-speckled sky.
composition: A central cat is the focal point; the rainbow enters from the left and the blue sky supplies spacious contrast.
pictorial_art: Cartoon pixel-art shading uses flat color regions, outlines, and small star highlights rather than photo dithering.
quality: Excellent pictorial readability: silhouette and rainbow motion read instantly at text-mode resolution.
summary: Cartoon title art: a central outlined cat, rainbow motion trail, and sparse blue star field.
